$description: Composition patterns for navigation and wayfinding. Navigation in this portal is self-revealing (DES-015) — it shows itself when needed and disappears when the seeker is reading. The navigation should never compete with the content for attention.

primary-navigation.$description: Top-level site navigation. Minimal items, clear hierarchy.

tokens.background: theme.bg (same as page — no distinct header bar in light themes)
tokens.active-indicator: gold interactive (1.0) — underline or bottom border

behavior.self-revealing: Header fades away on scroll down, reappears on scroll up or pause (DES-015). The reader shouldn't see navigation while immersed in text.
behavior.sticky: Becomes sticky at top on scroll up. Subtle shadow.subtle on sticky state.
behavior.mobile: Hamburger menu (44px touch target). Slide-in drawer from inline-end.

items.typography: ui-semibold for active, ui for others
items.spacing: generous (24px) gap between items on desktop, full-width rows on mobile

breadcrumbs.$description: Location indicator for chapter reading. Where am I in the book?

tokens.text: theme.text-secondary, ui typography at smaller size (12-13px)
tokens.separator: thin gold rule or › character at ambient opacity (0.3)

breadcrumbs.behavior: Links back to book table of contents and chapter list. Disappears in focus mode.

chapter-navigation.$description: Previous/next chapter navigation. Always available at the end of a chapter, optionally available in the sidebar.

tokens.text: theme.text, ui typography for labels, display typography for chapter titles
tokens.border-top: border.default — a quiet line separating navigation from content

chapter-navigation.behavior: After DES-012 'Breath Between Chapters' transition, next chapter begins. The navigation is the gate between chapters.

sidebar-toc.$description: Table of contents sidebar. Shows the book's chapter structure with current position highlighted.

tokens.width: w-72 (288px) — wide enough for chapter titles, narrow enough to not crowd reading

behavior.desktop: Fixed sidebar when screen width ≥ lg breakpoint

related-teachings-panel.$description: Side panel showing passages related to the settled paragraph (DES-009, DES-010). The 'Following the Thread' experience.
related-teachings-panel.register: reverential for passage content, functional for chrome

content.trigger: Settled paragraph (1200ms dwell in focus zone)
content.passage-mini-card: Compact passage-card variant — smaller typography, truncated to 3 lines, full attribution

related-teachings-panel.animation: content transition (300ms) on appear. Passages stagger in with 100ms delay between items.

footer.$description: Site footer. Practice bridge, SRF links, legal. The bottom of every page is an invitation to go deeper — into SRF practice, not just more reading.
sections: Practice Bridge: links to SRF Lessons, meditation information (PRI-04 signpost)
Cross-site links: yogananda.org sections via three-room model
